items.briefing:
Australian small businesses are increasingly worried about AI-powered cyberattacks, according to new research from WatchGuard. Separately, GitHub is currently investigating a possible security breach — if you use GitHub for storing code or projects, keep an eye on official updates and consider reviewing your account security. A reminder that if your organisation uses AI tools within business software like ERP systems, it's worth understanding where your data is being sent and stored.

**Practical tip:** Check that any AI-connected tools your organisation uses have clear privacy settings, and avoid entering sensitive business or client data unless you know how it's handled.

featured.title: Chief AI Officers: The next test of Australia's digital government leadership
featured.quote: AI governance gaps in Australian public services pose significant risks as agencies lack clear accountability structures.
